mapper.select:
select mt.market_no, mt.market_title, to_char(mt.market_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') as market_date, mt.market_writer, mt.view_count, mt.sell_addr, mt.sell_price, ( select count(*) from market_like_tbl ml where ml.market_no = mt.market_no ) as like_count,
( select count(*) from market_report_tbl mr where mr.market_no = mt.market_no ) as report_count, ( select market_file_path from ( select mf.market_file_path from market_file_tbl mf where mf.market_no = mt.market_no order by mf.market_file_no asc ) where rownum = 1 ) as marketThumb from market_tbl mt join member_tbl m on (mt.market_writer = m.member_id) where market_status = #{status} and completed = 0
and market_title like '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%'
and market_writer = #{searchKeyword}
order by market_no desc order by market_no asc order by view_count desc order by like_count desc order by sell_price desc
offset #{page}*#{size} rows fetch next #{size} rows only
mapper.insert: insert into market_tbl values( #{marketNo}, #{marketTitle}, #{marketContent}, sysdate, 1, #{marketWriter}, 0, #{sellAddr}, #{sellPrice}, 0, null )
mapper.select:
select m.market_no, m.market_title, m.market_content, m.market_date, m.market_status, m.market_writer, m.view_count, m.sell_addr, m.sell_price, m.completed, m.completed_date, (select count(*) from market_like_tbl where market_no = m.market_no) as like_count
,(select count(*) from market_like_tbl where market_no = m.market_no and member_id = #{memberId}) AS is_like
,(select count(*) from market_report_tbl where market_no = m.market_no) as report_count
,(select count(*) from market_report_tbl where market_no = m.market_no and member_id = #{memberId}) as is_report
,(select count(*) from trade_request_tbl where market_no = m.market_no and buyer_id = #{memberId}) as is_request
from market_tbl m where m.market_no = #{marketNo}
mapper.update: update market_tbl set view_count = view_count+1 where market_no = #{marketNo}
mapper.select: select count(*) from market_like_tbl where market_no = #{marketNo}

select market_no, market_title, to_char(market_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') as market_date, market_writer, view_count, sell_addr, sell_price, ( select market_file_path from ( select mf.market_file_path from market_file_tbl mf where mf.market_no = market_tbl.market_no order by mf.market_file_no asc ) where rownum = 1 ) as marketThumb from market_tbl where market_status = 1 and completed = 0
order by market_no desc order by view_count desc
fetch first 5 rows only

SELECT c.market_comment_no, c.market_no, c.market_comment_writer, m.member_thumb, c.market_comment_content, TO_CHAR(c.market_comment_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS market_comment_date, c.market_recomment_no, c.is_secret FROM market_comment_tbl c LEFT JOIN member_tbl m ON (c.market_comment_writer = m.member_id) WHERE c.market_no = #{marketNo} ORDER BY c.market_comment_no ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO market_comment_tbl ( market_comment_no, market_comment_content, market_comment_date, market_no, market_comment_writer, market_recomment_no, is_secret ) VALUES ( market_comment_seq.NEXTVAL, #{marketCommentContent}, SYSDATE, #{marketNo}, #{marketCommentWriter}, #{marketRecommentNo}, #{isSecret} )
mapper.select: select market_file_path from market_file_tbl where market_no = #{marketNo}
mapper.insert: insert into trade_request_tbl values( trade_request_seq.NEXTVAL, #{marketNo}, #{buyerId}, #{message}, 1, SYSDATE, NULL )
mapper.delete: delete from trade_request_tbl where market_no = #{marketNo} and buyer_id= #{buyerId}
mapper.select: select * from trade_request_tbl where market_no = #{marketNo} and status = 1
mapper.update: update market_tbl set completed = 1, completed_date = sysdate where market_no = #{marketNo}
mapper.delete: delete from market_report_tbl where market_no= #{marketNo} and member_id = #{memberId}
